image_0013117846f088.png.note: 矩陣平方等於單位矩陣但不等於負單位矩陣
image_0013117846f088.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"A^2=\\begin{bmatrix}1&1\\\\0&-1\\end{bmatrix}\\begin{bmatrix}1&1\\\\0&-1\\end{bmatrix}=\\begin{bmatrix}1&0\\\\0&1\\end{bmatrix}\\ne -I","note":"矩陣平方等於單位矩陣但不等於負單位矩陣"}

image_09dba0e297b336.png.note: 矩陣乘法等於負單位矩陣

image_12bf4c9a909d52.png.note: 矩陣乘法結果為零矩陣

image_1febdbe31805dd.png.note: 矩陣與單位矩陣相乘的等式
image_1febdbe31805dd.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"AI=IA=A","note":"矩陣與單位矩陣相乘的等式"}

image_205f154da58cad.png.note: 矩阵乘积的三次方等于负单位矩阵
image_205f154da58cad.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"(ABA)^3=-I","note":"矩阵乘积的三次方等于负单位矩阵"}

image_20d9c43a291bc2.png.note: 矩陣乘法得到單位矩陣

image_2e25c8d03a72ff.png.note: 矩陣乘法結果為零矩陣

image_2811c152f471da.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"= ABIBIBIBIBIBA = AB^{6}A = A(B^{3})^{2}A","note":"矩陣乘法化簡式"}

image_354e8ab8ebcef1.png.note: 矩陣平方等於負單位矩陣

image_4656690a5ebb0c.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"= AB^3 A = A(8I)A = 8AIA = 8A^2 = 8I","note":"矩陣乘法化簡式"}

image_471647573f0a50.png.note: 兩個字母變數或線段名

image_4c0e1d586777b2.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"(AB)^{-1}=C\\Rightarrow(AB)(AB)^{-1}=ABC\\Rightarrow I=ABC\\Rightarrow A^{-1}=BC","note":"矩陣反矩陣推導式"}

image_5861edd29c02d9.png.note: 矩陣與單位矩陣的平方展開
image_5861edd29c02d9.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"(A+I)^2=(A+I)(A+I)=A^2+IA+AI+I^2=A^2+2A+I","note":"矩陣與單位矩陣的平方展開"}

image_5c60f24a2fc9f9.png.note: 單一斜體大寫字母 I

image_5f202280e7eda6.png.note: 矩陣乘法與加法交換後的等式
image_5f202280e7eda6.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"A(B+C)=(C+B)A","note":"矩陣乘法與加法交換後的等式"}

image_61e65d0d2aeaad.png.note: 矩陣平方等於單位矩陣

image_6995918af4bd8f.png.note: 矩陣乘法結果為零矩陣

image_7eb214f1f389aa.png.note: 五個相同上劃線ABA因式相乘

image_85a896697fd4b3.png.note: 二項式平方展開前的乘積形式
image_85a896697fd4b3.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"(A+B)^2=(A+B)(A+B)","note":"二項式平方展開前的乘積形式"}

image_8a18e25d551f8c.png.note: 矩陣平方等於負單位矩陣

image_a4acd27ee94a40.png.note: 矩陣 B 的表示式

image_adda879ba32371.png.note: 矩陣乘法不滿足平方差公式
image_adda879ba32371.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"(A+B)(A-B) \neq A^2 - B^2","note":"矩陣乘法不滿足平方差公式"}

image_bafdae1d38f4d9.png.note: 矩陣 A 的平方運算結果為單位矩陣 I
image_bafdae1d38f4d9.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"A^2 = \\begin{bmatrix} -1 & 0 \\\\ 0 & 1 \\end{bmatrix} \\begin{bmatrix} -1 & 0 \\\\ 0 & 1 \\end{bmatrix} = \\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 0 \\\\ 0 & 1 \\end{bmatrix} = I","note":"矩陣 A 的平方運算結果為單位矩陣 I"}

image_caaba199c21259.png.note: 矩陣 A 等於單位矩陣 I
image_caaba199c21259.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"A = I","note":"矩陣 A 等於單位矩陣 I"}

image_c6889b7e0d119d.png.note: 兩個二階矩陣不相等的反例
image_c6889b7e0d119d.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\begin{bmatrix} 0 & 1 \\\\ 0 & 0 \\end{bmatrix} \\neq \\begin{bmatrix} 0 & 5 \\\\ 0 & 0 \\end{bmatrix}","note":"兩個二階矩陣不相等的反例"}

image_cb62cf2a293933.png.note: 矩陣不滿足完全平方公式
image_cb62cf2a293933.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"(A+B)^2 \\neq A^2 + 2AB + B^2","note":"矩陣不滿足完全平方公式"}

image_cc45b8f9fbef14.png.latex: = ABA^2 BA^2 BA^2 BA^2 BA^2 BA
image_cc45b8f9fbef14.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"= ABA^2 BA^2 BA^2 BA^2 BA^2 BA","note":"矩陣乘法運算式"}

image_cca22ccd2ff06f.png.note: 矩陣 A 的平方等於單位矩陣
image_cca22ccd2ff06f.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"A^2 = I","note":"矩陣 A 的平方等於單位矩陣"}

image_cd551788eb5ceb.png.note: 矩陣恆等式 I squared equals I
image_cd551788eb5ceb.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"I^{2} = I","note":"矩陣恆等式 I squared equals I"}

image_ce18525087deea.png.note: 矩陣乘法運算：反射矩陣的平方等於單位矩陣
image_ce18525087deea.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 0 \\\\ 0 & -1 \\end{bmatrix}\\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 0 \\\\ 0 & -1 \\end{bmatrix} = \\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 0 \\\\ 0 & 1 \\end{bmatrix}","note":"矩陣乘法運算：反射矩陣的平方等於單位矩陣"}

image_d37390f124738c.png.note: 負二分之一乘以二階矩陣

image_d924bb91a2a66d.png.note: 矩陣B的3次方等於單位矩陣I
image_d924bb91a2a66d.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"B^3 = I","note":"矩陣B的3次方等於單位矩陣I"}

image_daa5bca479af18.png.note: 數學公式 AB + AC = AB
image_daa5bca479af18.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"AB + AC = AB","note":"數學公式 AB + AC = AB"}

image_e3a478af1b2aef.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"= A(-I)^2 A = A^2 = I","note":"矩陣運算"}

image_e5dc69d174d37e.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"A^6 = A^3 A^3","note":"矩陣的冪次運算等式"}

image_e8aeb300dcc5a8.png.note: 矩陣 A 的平方等於單位矩陣 I
image_e8aeb300dcc5a8.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"A^2 = I","note":"矩陣 A 的平方等於單位矩陣 I"}

image_ebcd522f296681.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"(A+I)^2 = A^2 + 2A + I","note":"矩陣和的平方公式"}

image_ea9261f1761d9b.png.note: 矩陣 AC 的乘積結果

image_edb82548c9aefa.png.note: 矩陣乘法等式，結果為單位矩陣
image_edb82548c9aefa.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 0 \\\\ 0 & 2 \\end{bmatrix} \\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 0 \\\\ 0 & \\frac{1}{2} \\end{bmatrix} = \\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 0 \\\\ 0 & 1 \\end{bmatrix}","note":"矩陣乘法等式，結果為單位矩陣"}

image_f0e865bce4a53f.png.note: 矩陣 A 的平方等於單位矩陣 I
image_f0e865bce4a53f.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"A^2 = \\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 0 \\\\ 0 & -1 \\end{bmatrix} \\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 0 \\\\ 0 & -1 \\end{bmatrix} = \\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 0 \\\\ 0 & 1 \\end{bmatrix} = I","note":"矩陣 A 的平方等於單位矩陣 I"}

image_f8cb7031dc4f41.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"(A + B)^2 = (A + B)(A + B) = A^2 + AB + BA + B^2","note":"矩陣和的平方展開式"}

image_f9a87d1cb6cf39.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"= A(A + B) + B(A + B)","note":"多項式展開算式"}

image_fc7bd11f965c39.png.note: 矩陣乘法運算示例，說明結果不為零矩陣
image_fc7bd11f965c39.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\begin{bmatrix} 2 & -1 \\ 0 & 0 \end{bmatrix} \begin{bmatrix} 0 & 2 \\ 0 & 0 \end{bmatrix} = \begin{bmatrix} 0 & 4 \\ 0 & 0 \end{bmatrix} \neq \begin{bmatrix} 0 & 0 \\ 0 & 0 \end{bmatrix}","note":"矩陣乘法運算示例，說明結果不為零矩陣"}
